n: A Man Adrift, Part 3: Honouring Their Sacrifice

steps.t: Mêshka has requested that you meet her at the Fleet-watch Tavern, located at the southern end of the Fleet-fast, across from the Old Bastion Inn.
Mêshka is commissioning a memorial for the crew of the Rebuke and has asked for your assistance in choosing a location.
You have scouted several possible locations for Mêshka. You should return to her at the Fleet-watch Tavern at the southern end of the Fleet-fast to te…
